rationales.hedonism: He makes a real dinner, opens wine, and sits down properly to enjoy it, treating sensory pleasure as worth time even before the guilt arithmetic starts.
He uses the unexpected free hour for a stroopwafel and quiet people-watching, and explicitly values how much better that small pleasure makes him feel.

rationales.self_direction: He knows going home to nap would be the sensible choice, but lets imagined judgment from the department override his own better judgment.
rationales.hedonism: He refuses a needed nap, forces himself through bad coffee and unproductive work, and ends the day eating cereal standing up, neglecting rest and comfort.
rationales.achievement: Getting up at five and staying glued to the laptop despite exhaustion shows he is still prioritizing thesis work and performance standards over recovery.
rationales.conformity: His decision turns on how it would look for the oldest student to leave and rest, showing restraint shaped by academic expectations and appearances.

rationales.hedonism: He lets himself sit in the dark with a Bill Evans record without trying to make it productive, treating simple enjoyment and rest as enough for the night.
He buys the appelgebak, eats it slowly, and notes that he can enjoy it without the usual guilt tally.
rationales.achievement: The archive visit gives him three absorbed hours of productive primary-source work, and he explicitly frames the treat as acceptable because it came after the work.

rationales.hedonism: Even during a simple beer on Pieter's terrace, he cannot allow himself to enjoy the moment without mentally pricing what it costs him.
rationales.achievement: His attention stays fixed on the Monday supervisor meeting and rough chapter draft, showing work obligations dominating the social evening.

rationales.hedonism: He gives up a meal he knows he would have enjoyed with a friend and ends the day with bleakness and a desk sandwich instead.
rationales.achievement: He chooses desk revisions, supervision prep, and more reading even though he knows the work is not truly urgent, prioritizing responsibility over pleasure.

rationales.self_direction: Instead of defaulting back to the laptop, he deliberately chooses the bath and lets the thesis wait until morning on his own terms.
rationales.hedonism: The bath, bath oil, clean clothes, and quiet tea are deliberate acts of comfort, and he concludes that for tonight this is enough.
